_comment: OPTIONAL. References community/official MCP servers for Docker management. The docker skills work without any MCP server (via each tool's REST API / the Docker Engine API / compose files). Enable only the server(s) matching the control plane you use. Never commit real credentials — values come from the environment. Verify each launch command against the server's current README; packaging changes over time.

npm._comment: OUR OWN server (built in this repo at src/NpmMcp, distributed as a Native AOT binary via GitHub Releases). Manages nginx-proxy-manager directly. The generic launcher downloads the right per-arch binary on first run (no .NET runtime needed). Set NPM_URL (e.g. http://npm.lan:81), NPM_EMAIL, NPM_PASSWORD; NPM_VERIFY_SSL=0 for self-signed certs. SECRETS: rather than env/dotfiles, store them with `homelab-secret set NPM_PASSWORD` (homelab-core skill 'homelab-secrets') — if homelab-secret is on PATH the launcher auto-resolves any unset NPM_* (see mcp/npm/SECRETS) from the OS secret store.

dockhand._comment: OUR OWN native server (built in this repo at src/DockhandMcp, distributed as a Native AOT binary via GitHub Releases). Does what strausmann/mcp-dockhand does but as a self-contained CLI binary — NO local Docker container required. Talks to the Dockhand REST API. Set DOCKHAND_URL (e.g. http://dockhand.lan:3000) and either DOCKHAND_TOKEN (API token, preferred) or DOCKHAND_USERNAME + DOCKHAND_PASSWORD; DOCKHAND_VERIFY_SSL=0 for self-signed certs. Store secrets with `homelab-secret set DOCKHAND_PASSWORD` — the launcher auto-resolves any unset DOCKHAND_* (see mcp/dockhand/SECRETS). Fallback (container-based) alternative: `docker run --rm -i -e DOCKHAND_URL -e DOCKHAND_USERNAME -e DOCKHAND_PASSWORD ghcr.io/strausmann/mcp-dockhand:latest`.

portainer._comment: Secondary. Official portainer/portainer-mcp. Match the package version to your Portainer version (e.g. ~=2.42).
